Home / Projects / Linux / Buildroot & QEMU

Buildroot & QEMU

Building embedded Linux systems with Buildroot and running them in QEMU AArch64.

Overview

This section covers setting up a complete embedded Linux environment using Buildroot targeting AArch64, running under QEMU. Topics include out-of-tree kernel module integration, rootfs overlays, init scripts, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.

Articles

  • AArch64 Embedded Linux with Buildroot & QEMU

    Setting up a full embedded Linux environment targeting AArch64 in QEMU.

    BuildrootQEMUAArch64embedded
